boundary_binding.action_boundary: May operations execute the regulated data export?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match on sensitivity class

final_answer: Action may not proceed. REL-DOV-084 shows dataset-sensitivity class remains pending for DOV-RISK-4. STD-DOV-084-P requires exact match on all fields including class before transfer. Boundary open due to unresolved abstract-field trap. Escalate for verification.
